STRENGTH.name: Athletics
STRENGTH.description: Physical exercises such as rock climbing

STRENGTH.name: Endurance
STRENGTH.description: Resistance to fatigue, poison and environmental hazards, running and swimming

STRENGTH.name: Heavy lifting
STRENGTH.description: Ability to carry, move, or break heavy objects

DEXTERITY.name: Stealth
DEXTERITY.description: Ability to move silently and avoid detection

DEXTERITY.name: Acrobatics
DEXTERITY.description: Flexibility, tricks, ability to enter narrow passages

DEXTERITY.name: Hand dexterity
DEXTERITY.description: Picking locks, defusing traps and hand dexterity

DEXTERITY.name: Ranged combat
DEXTERITY.description: Proficiency with a bow, pistol, and throwing weapons

INTELLECT.name: Knowledge
INTELLECT.description: Knowledge about the world and history

INTELLECT.name: Medicine
INTELLECT.description: Healing wounds, treating diseases and understanding anatomy

INTELLECT.name: Mental toughness
INTELLECT.description: The ability to think clearly in difficult circumstances

PERCEPTION.name: Awareness
PERCEPTION.description: Spotting hidden details, traps and ambushes

PERCEPTION.name: Insight
PERCEPTION.description: Reading people's motives and detecting lies

PERCEPTION.name: Survival
PERCEPTION.description: Navigating and surviving in the wilderness

PERCEPTION.name: Tracking
PERCEPTION.description: Following footsteps and identifying hidden passages

CHARISMA.name: Persuasion
CHARISMA.description: Convincing others to see your point of view

CHARISMA.name: Intimidation
CHARISMA.description: Coercing others through fear or threats

CHARISMA.name: Performance
CHARISMA.description: Acting, singing, or any other performing arts
